style: Vertical 1024x1536 food poster in a playful minimal product-poster style. The main real-object anchor is a photographically realistic [DISH], shown with its true texture, natural color, gentle steam where appropriate, and a soft contact shadow, placed on a clean warm off-white background with generous negative space. Do NOT turn the dish into a cartoon or flat illustration. Add ONE primitive black-line micro worker — a tiny product operator drawn with a thick uneven black marker: a blank lumpy circle-ish head built from a few short broken strokes, no face or eyes, a short open-segment tube body, stiff segmented arms, blocky paddle hands, short bent dash feet, naive proportions, no detailed clothes, no hair, no cute expression. [ACTION]. Add only minimal action-supporting marks if they clarify the action: one ladle, one steam arc, one ground line, or two small drops. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT anywhere — no Chinese characters, no English letters, no numbers, no labels, no captions, no watermark, no AI-generated labels, no random glyphs. No official brand logo, no cute sticker mascot, no realistic human face, no comic-panel layout, no dense decoration. Keep the dish photographic and let the crude black doodle worker interact playfully with it.

heroes.name: 金牌老母鸡汤
heroes.dish: bowl of clear, glistening golden Chinese old-hen chicken soup with a few tender meat pieces and scallions
heroes.action: The worker stands at the rim of the bowl and lifts a small ladle of steaming broth

heroes.name: 西红柿炒鸡蛋
heroes.dish: white plate of Chinese scrambled eggs with bright red tomato chunks and a glossy sheen
heroes.action: The worker holds a small spatula and scoops a bite from the plate

heroes.name: 宫保鸡丁
heroes.dish: plate of Gongbao diced chicken with peanuts and dried red chilies
heroes.action: The worker tosses a single peanut up into the air above the plate

heroes.name: 小炒黄牛肉
heroes.dish: sizzling plate of stir-fried yellow beef strips with green peppers and red chili
heroes.action: The worker waves a small hand fan at the rising steam

heroes.name: 梅菜扣肉
heroes.dish: bowl of glistening braised pork belly slices layered with preserved mustard greens
heroes.action: The worker lifts one slice of pork belly with a pair of chopsticks

heroes.name: 粉蒸肉
heroes.dish: steamed bowl of pork ribs coated in moist rice flour and sliced potato
heroes.action: The worker sprinkles a pinch of rice-flour powder from above

heroes.name: 剁椒鱼头
heroes.dish: steamed fish head on a plate covered with bright red chopped chilies and green scallions
heroes.action: The worker carefully places one extra red chili on top of the fish

heroes.name: 土豆牛腩
heroes.dish: bowl of beef brisket stew with soft potato chunks in a rich brown broth
heroes.action: The worker stirs the broth with a small ladle

heroes.name: 白菜炖豆腐
heroes.dish: clay pot of tender cabbage and white tofu cubes in clear broth
heroes.action: The worker lifts the clay pot lid, releasing a steam puff

heroes.name: 口水鸡
heroes.dish: plate of poached chicken pieces drizzled with red chili oil and sesame seeds
heroes.action: The worker pours a small stream of red chili oil over the chicken

heroes.name: 柠檬凤爪
heroes.dish: plate of chilled chicken feet garnished with bright yellow lemon slices and chili
heroes.action: The worker squeezes a lemon wedge over the plate

heroes.name: 卤鸡腿
heroes.dish: single glossy soy-braised chicken drumstick on a small plate
heroes.action: The worker lifts the drumstick with both hands

heroes.name: 卤鸡爪
heroes.dish: plate of glossy soy-braised chicken feet
heroes.action: The worker carries one chicken foot away like a log

heroes.name: 鸡汁汤包
heroes.dish: bamboo steamer filled with plump soup dumplings
heroes.action: The worker lifts one dumpling with chopsticks

heroes.name: 手工春卷
heroes.dish: plate of golden fried spring rolls with a small dish of dipping sauce
heroes.action: The worker dips one spring roll into the sauce

heroes.name: 牛肉盒
heroes.dish: crispy folded fried meat pocket on a plate
heroes.action: The worker holds up the folded meat pocket

heroes.name: 香酥鸡米花
heroes.dish: basket piled with crispy golden popcorn chicken nuggets
heroes.action: The worker reaches into the basket to grab one nugget

heroes.name: 炸鸡排
heroes.dish: large golden fried breaded chicken cutlet on a plate
heroes.action: The worker cuts a slice from the cutlet with a tiny knife

heroes.name: 砂锅酸菜鱼
heroes.dish: clay pot filled with white fish slices and pickled greens in sour broth
heroes.action: The worker lifts the lid of the clay pot, steam rising

heroes.name: 金汤酸菜鱼
heroes.dish: bowl of golden sour broth with tender fish slices and pickled greens
heroes.action: The worker tastes the broth with a small spoon

heroes.name: 鸡汤娃娃菜
heroes.dish: bowl of baby cabbage leaves in clear golden chicken broth
heroes.action: The worker pours a small stream of broth over the cabbage

heroes.name: 西红柿炒鸡蛋盖饭
heroes.dish: bowl of white rice topped with tomato-egg stir-fry
heroes.action: The worker mixes the topping into the rice with a spoon

heroes.name: 鸡笼香柠檬茶
heroes.dish: tall glass of iced lemon tea with yellow lemon slices and ice cubes
heroes.action: The worker drops a lemon slice into the glass, creating a small splash

heroes.name: 毛豆烧土鸡
heroes.dish: plate of braised free-range chicken pieces with green edamame pods
heroes.action: The worker tosses one edamame pod into the air
